titleStmt.title: SII 36.49: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 49. (A.R. No. 49 of 1910.) VĒPPATTŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kaṟkaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of fifty kācus for maintaining one perpetual lamp in the Arumarunduḍaiyār temple at Tirundudēvaṅguḍi, a brahmadēya in Miḻalaināḍu, a subdivision of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, by Araiyaṉ Chīrāḷadēvaṉ alias Rājarāja Mūvēṉdavēḷār of Cheṉṉimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who held the right of working in thirty days cycle have agreed to maintain the lamp. Mentions also a grant of two tiered lamp-stand.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ [śrī]rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu virutarājabhayaṅkara vaḷaṉā
ṭṭu miḻalai nāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruntutevaṅkuṭi Arumaruntuṭaiyāṟkku cantrātittavaṟp palicai
cekuttu nittam Oru tirunuṉtāviḷakku Erikkakkaṭavarkaḷāka kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nā
ṭṭuc ceṉṉimaṅkalattu ceṉṉimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ cīrāḷatevaṉāna Irājarāja mūveṉta veḷār
pakkal Ik koyilil muppatuvaṭṭattuk kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇaroṅ kaik koṇṭa kācu Aimpatum I
t tirunuṉtāviḷakku Erikkaikku Iṭṭa Iraṇṭunilait tirukkutti viḷakku Oṉṟināl yiṭai nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Ai
m palam Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
